sentences.sentence: For seven decades, Georgia O’Keeffe (1887–1986) was a major figure in American art.
sentences.translation: 七十年间，乔治娅·欧姬芙（1887—1986）一直是美国艺术界的重要人物。

structure.text: For seven decades
Georgia O’Keeffe (1887–1986)
was a major figure in American art

difficult_points: For seven decades 表示持续时间，was 说明这段时期的身份。
major figure 指重要人物，而不是具体艺术作品。

sentences.sentence: Remarkably, she remained independent from shifting art trends and her work stayed true to her own vision, which was based on finding the essential, abstract forms in nature.
sentences.translation: 值得注意的是，她始终不受不断变化的艺术潮流影响，她的作品也忠于自己的愿景——从自然中寻找本质的抽象形式。

structure.text: Remarkably
she remained independent from shifting art trends
and her work stayed true to her own vision
which was based on finding the essential, abstract forms in nature

difficult_points: and 连接两个并列分句，分别说明她本人和作品的独立性。
which 修饰 vision；be based on 后接动名词 finding。

sentences.sentence: With exceptionally keen powers of observation and great finesse with a paintbrush, she recorded subtle nuances of colour, shape, and light that enlivened her paintings and attracted a wide audience.
sentences.translation: 凭借异常敏锐的观察力和高超的画笔技巧，她记录下色彩、形状和光线的细微变化，使画作生动起来并吸引了广泛观众。

structure.text: With exceptionally keen powers of observation and great finesse with a paintbrush
she recorded subtle nuances of colour, shape, and light
that enlivened her paintings and attracted a wide audience

difficult_points: With 短语说明她创作所凭借的能力。
that 引导定语从句修饰 nuances，enlivened 和 attracted 并列。

sentences.sentence: Born in 1887 near Sun Prairie, Wisconsin to cattle breeders Francis and Ida O’Keeffe, Georgia was raised on their farm along with her six siblings.
sentences.translation: 乔治娅1887年出生于威斯康星州森普雷里附近，父母是养牛户弗朗西斯和艾达·欧姬芙；她与六个兄弟姐妹一起在父母的农场长大。

structure.text: Born in 1887 near Sun Prairie, Wisconsin to cattle breeders Francis and Ida O’Keeffe
Georgia
was raised on their farm along with her six siblings

difficult_points: Born 短语的逻辑主语是 Georgia。
was raised 是被动语态，along with 表示和兄弟姐妹一起。

sentences.sentence: By the time she graduated from high school in 1905, she had determined to make her way as an artist.
sentences.translation: 到1905年高中毕业时，她已经决定要成为一名艺术家闯出自己的道路。

structure.text: By the time she graduated from high school in 1905
she had determined
to make her way as an artist

difficult_points: By the time 从句与过去完成时 had determined 搭配，强调先发生的决定。
make one's way as 表示以某种身份闯出道路。

sentences.sentence: She studied the techniques of traditional painting at the Art Institute of Chicago school (1905) and the Art Students League of New York (1907–8).
sentences.translation: 她在芝加哥艺术学院（1905年）和纽约艺术学生联盟（1907—08年）学习传统绘画技巧。

structure.text: She
studied
the techniques of traditional painting
at the Art Institute of Chicago school (1905) and the Art Students League of New York (1907–8)

difficult_points: at 后并列两个学习机构。
techniques of traditional painting 指传统绘画的技法。

sentences.sentence: After attending university and then training college, she became an art teacher and taught in elementary schools, high schools, and colleges in Virginia, Texas, and South Carolina from 1911 to 1918.
sentences.translation: 上过大学并随后接受师范培训后，她成为艺术教师，1911年至1918年在弗吉尼亚、得克萨斯和南卡罗来纳的中小学及大学任教。

structure.text: After attending university and then training college
she became an art teacher and taught in elementary schools, high schools, and colleges
in Virginia, Texas, and South Carolina from 1911 to 1918

difficult_points: After 后两个动名词 attending 和 training 并列。
became 与 taught 是并列谓语，from...to... 修饰任教时间。

sentences.sentence: During this period, O’Keeffe began to experiment with creating abstract compositions in charcoal, and produced a series of innovative drawings that led her art in a new direction.
sentences.translation: 在此期间，欧姬芙开始尝试用木炭创作抽象构图，并创作出一系列使她的艺术走向新方向的创新素描。

structure.text: During this period
O’Keeffe began to experiment with creating abstract compositions in charcoal
and produced a series of innovative drawings
that led her art in a new direction

difficult_points: experiment with 后接动名词 creating。
that 修饰 drawings，lead...in a direction 表示引领艺术方向。

sentences.sentence: She sent some of these drawings to a friend in New York, who showed them to art collector and photographer Alfred Stieglitz in January 1916.
sentences.translation: 她把其中一些素描寄给纽约的一位朋友，朋友于1916年1月把它们展示给艺术收藏家兼摄影师阿尔弗雷德·施蒂格利茨。

structure.text: She sent some of these drawings to a friend in New York
who showed them to art collector and photographer Alfred Stieglitz in January 1916

difficult_points: who 指代 a friend，而 them 指 drawings。
show A to B 表示把 A 展示给 B。

sentences.sentence: Stieglitz was impressed, and exhibited the drawings later that year at his gallery on Fifth Avenue, New York City, where the works of many avant-garde artists and photographers were introduced to the American public.
sentences.translation: 施蒂格利茨深受触动，当年晚些时候在纽约市第五大道的画廊展出了这些素描；那里还向美国公众介绍了许多先锋艺术家和摄影师的作品。

structure.text: Stieglitz was impressed, and exhibited the drawings later that year
at his gallery on Fifth Avenue, New York City
where the works of many avant-garde artists and photographers were introduced to the American public

difficult_points: and 连接 was impressed 与 exhibited 两个谓语。
where 指代画廊地点，were introduced 是被动语态。

sentences.sentence: With Stieglitz’s encouragement and promise of financial support, O’Keeffe arrived in New York in June 1918 to begin a career as an artist.
sentences.translation: 在施蒂格利茨的鼓励和经济支持承诺下，欧姬芙于1918年6月来到纽约，开始艺术家生涯。

structure.text: With Stieglitz’s encouragement and promise of financial support
O’Keeffe arrived in New York in June 1918
to begin a career as an artist

difficult_points: With 短语说明她前往纽约的支持背景。
to begin 表示到纽约的目的。

sentences.sentence: For the next three decades, Stieglitz vigorously promoted her work in twenty-two solo exhibitions and numerous group installations.
sentences.translation: 接下来的三十年里，施蒂格利茨在22次个人展览和众多群展中大力推广她的作品。

structure.text: For the next three decades
Stieglitz
vigorously promoted her work
in twenty-two solo exhibitions and numerous group installations

difficult_points: For 短语说明推广持续的时间。
in 后并列两种展览形式。

sentences.sentence: The two were married in 1924.
sentences.translation: 两人于1924年结婚。

structure.text: The two
were married

difficult_points: The two 指 O’Keeffe 和 Stieglitz。
were married 是被动形式，也可理解为“结婚”。

sentences.sentence: The ups and downs of their personal and professional relationship were recorded in Stieglitz’s celebrated black-and-white portraits of O’Keeffe, taken over the course of twenty years (1917–37).
sentences.translation: 他们个人和职业关系的起伏，被记录在施蒂格利茨著名的欧姬芙黑白肖像中，这些照片拍摄于20年间（1917—37年）。

structure.text: The ups and downs of their personal and professional relationship
were recorded in Stieglitz’s celebrated black-and-white portraits of O’Keeffe
taken over the course of twenty years (1917–37)

difficult_points: ups and downs 指关系的起伏变化。
taken 过去分词修饰 portraits，说明拍摄时间跨度。

sentences.sentence: By the mid-1920s, O’Keeffe was recognized as one of America’s most important and successful artists, widely known for the architectural pictures that dramatically depict the soaring skyscrapers of New York.
sentences.translation: 到20世纪20年代中期，欧姬芙已被公认为美国最重要、最成功的艺术家之一，并因戏剧性描绘纽约高耸摩天楼的建筑画而广为人知。

structure.text: By the mid-1920s
O’Keeffe was recognized as one of America’s most important and successful artists
widely known for the architectural pictures
that dramatically depict the soaring skyscrapers of New York

difficult_points: was recognized as 是被动语态，as 后为身份补语。
that 修饰 pictures，depict 的宾语是 skyscrapers。

sentences.sentence: But most often, she painted botanical subjects, inspired by annual trips to the Stieglitz family summer home.
sentences.translation: 但她最常画植物题材，这些题材灵感来自每年去施蒂格利茨家避暑别墅的旅行。

structure.text: But most often
she painted botanical subjects
inspired by annual trips to the Stieglitz family summer home

difficult_points: inspired 过去分词修饰 botanical subjects。
most often 表示频率最高的创作主题。

sentences.sentence: In her magnified images depicting flowers, begun in 1924, O’Keeffe brings the viewer right into the picture.
sentences.translation: 在她1924年开始创作的花卉放大图像中，欧姬芙把观众直接带入画面。

structure.text: In her magnified images depicting flowers, begun in 1924
O’Keeffe brings the viewer right into the picture
depicting flowers

difficult_points: begun in 1924 是过去分词短语修饰 images。
bring the viewer into the picture 是比喻，指增强沉浸感。

sentences.sentence: Enlarging the tiniest details to fill an entire metre-wide canvas emphasized their shapes and lines and made them appear abstract.
sentences.translation: 把最微小的细节放大到填满一米宽的画布，突出了它们的形状和线条，也使它们显得抽象。

structure.text: Enlarging the tiniest details to fill an entire metre-wide canvas
emphasized their shapes and lines and made them appear abstract

difficult_points: Enlarging 动名词短语作主语，to fill 表示放大的结果。
emphasize 与 make 并列；make + 宾语 + appear 是使役结构。

sentences.sentence: Such daring compositions helped establish O’Keeffe’s reputation as an innovative modernist.
sentences.translation: 如此大胆的构图帮助欧姬芙确立了创新现代主义艺术家的声誉。

structure.text: Such daring compositions
helped establish
O’Keeffe’s reputation as an innovative modernist

difficult_points: helped establish 后接 reputation，as 短语说明声誉身份。
Such 指代前句放大细节的大胆构图。

sentences.sentence: In 1929, O’Keeffe made her first extended trip to the state of New Mexico.
sentences.translation: 1929年，欧姬芙首次长途前往新墨西哥州。

structure.text: O’Keeffe
made her first extended trip to the state of New Mexico

difficult_points: made a trip 表示进行一次旅行。
extended 表示时间较长。

sentences.sentence: It was a visit that had a lasting impact on her life, and an immediate effect on her work.
sentences.translation: 这次访问对她的生活产生了持久影响，也立即影响了她的创作。

structure.text: It was a visit
that had a lasting impact on her life, and an immediate effect on her work

difficult_points: that 修饰 visit，两个并列名词短语说明影响。
lasting 与 immediate 对比影响持续时间。

sentences.sentence: Over the next two decades she made almost annual trips to New Mexico, staying up to six months there, painting in relative solitude, then returning to New York each winter to exhibit the new work at Stieglitz’s gallery.
sentences.translation: 接下来的二十年里，她几乎每年都去新墨西哥，在那里最多住六个月，独自作画，然后每年冬天回到纽约，在施蒂格利茨的画廊展出新作。

structure.text: Over the next two decades
she made almost annual trips to New Mexico
staying up to six months there, painting in relative solitude, then returning to New York each winter
to exhibit the new work at Stieglitz’s gallery

difficult_points: 三个分词 staying、painting、returning 按时间顺序描述伴随行动。
to exhibit 表示回纽约的目的。

sentences.sentence: This pattern continued until she moved permanently to New Mexico in 1949.
sentences.translation: 这种模式一直持续到1949年她永久搬到新墨西哥。

structure.text: This pattern
continued
until she moved permanently to New Mexico in 1949

difficult_points: until 从句说明旅行模式结束的时间。
permanently 表示永久定居，而非短期访问。

sentences.sentence: There, O’Keeffe found new inspiration: at first, it was the numerous sun-bleached bones she came across in the state’s rugged terrain that sparked her imagination.
sentences.translation: 在那里，欧姬芙找到了新的灵感：起初，正是她在该州崎岖地形中遇到的大量被阳光晒白的骨头激发了想象力。

structure.text: There
O’Keeffe found new inspiration
it was the numerous sun-bleached bones she came across in the state’s rugged terrain that sparked her imagination
she came across in the state’s rugged terrain

difficult_points: it was...that... 是强调句，强调 sun-bleached bones。
she came across 修饰 bones，come across 表示偶然发现。

sentences.sentence: Two of her earliest and most celebrated Southwestern paintings exquisitely reproduce a cow skull’s weathered surfaces, jagged edges, and irregular openings.
sentences.translation: 她最早且最著名的两幅西南题材画作，精细再现了牛头骨风化的表面、锯齿状边缘和不规则孔洞。

structure.text: Two of her earliest and most celebrated Southwestern paintings
exquisitely reproduce
a cow skull’s weathered surfaces, jagged edges, and irregular openings

difficult_points: Two of... paintings 是主语，of 短语限定作品范围。
三个并列名词具体描绘牛头骨形态。

sentences.sentence: Later, she also explored another variation on this theme in her large series of Pelvis pictures, which focused on the contrasts between convex and concave surfaces, and solid and open spaces.
sentences.translation: 后来，她又在大型《骨盆》系列中探索了这一主题的另一种变化，作品聚焦于凸面与凹面、实体空间与开放空间之间的对比。

structure.text: Later
she also explored another variation on this theme in her large series of Pelvis pictures
which focused on the contrasts between convex and concave surfaces, and solid and open spaces

difficult_points: which 修饰 Pelvis pictures，between 连接两组对比。
variation on a theme 表示同一主题的变体。

sentences.sentence: However, it was the region’s spectacular landscape, with its unusual geological formations, vivid colours, clarity of light, and exotic vegetation, that held the artist’s imagination for more than four decades.
sentences.translation: 然而，真正持续四十多年吸引艺术家想象力的，是该地区壮丽的景观——独特的地质构造、鲜艳的色彩、清澈的光线和奇异的植被。

structure.text: However

it was the region’s spectacular landscape, with its unusual geological formations, vivid colours, clarity of light, and exotic vegetation, that held the artist’s imagination for more than four decades
with its unusual geological formations, vivid colours, clarity of light, and exotic vegetation

difficult_points: it was...that... 强调真正吸引她的是景观。
with 短语列举景观的四种特征。

sentences.sentence: Often, she painted the rocks, cliffs, and mountains in striking close-up, just as she had done with her botanical subjects.
sentences.translation: 她常以引人注目的特写方式描绘岩石、悬崖和山脉，就像此前描绘植物题材一样。

structure.text: Often
she painted the rocks, cliffs, and mountains in striking close-up
just as she had done with her botanical subjects

difficult_points: just as 引导方式比较从句，had done 中省略 painted。
in close-up 表示特写视角。

sentences.sentence: O’Keeffe eventually owned two homes in New Mexico – the first, her summer retreat at Ghost Ranch, was nestled beneath 200-metre cliffs, while the second, used as her winter residence, was in the small town of Abiquiú.
sentences.translation: 欧姬芙最终在新墨西哥拥有两处住宅——第一处是幽灵牧场的避暑地，坐落在200米高的悬崖下；第二处作为冬季住所，位于小镇阿比丘。

structure.text: O’Keeffe eventually owned two homes in New Mexico
the first, her summer retreat at Ghost Ranch, was nestled beneath 200-metre cliffs
while the second, used as her winter residence, was in the small town of Abiquiú

difficult_points: 破折号后分列 first 和 second 两处住宅，while 连接对比。
used as her winter residence 是过去分词短语修饰 second。

sentences.sentence: While both locales provided a wealth of imagery for her paintings, one feature of the Abiquiú house – the large walled patio with its black door – was particularly inspirational.
sentences.translation: 虽然两处地点都为她的画作提供了丰富意象，但阿比丘住宅的一个特色——带黑门的大型围墙庭院——尤其激发灵感。

structure.text: While both locales provided a wealth of imagery for her paintings
one feature of the Abiquiú house – the large walled patio with its black door – was particularly inspirational
the large walled patio with its black door

difficult_points: While 引导让步从句，主句突出阿比丘住宅的庭院。
破折号内容是 feature 的同位语。

sentences.sentence: In more than thirty pictures between 1946 and 1960, she reinvented the patio into an abstract arrangement of geometric shapes.
sentences.translation: 在1946年至1960年间的三十多幅画作中，她把庭院重新创造为由几何形状组成的抽象组合。

structure.text: In more than thirty pictures between 1946 and 1960
she reinvented the patio into an abstract arrangement of geometric shapes

difficult_points: reinvent A into B 表示把 A 重新塑造成 B。
between...and... 修饰 pictures 的创作时间。

sentences.sentence: From the 1950s into the 1970s, O’Keeffe travelled widely, making trips to Asia, the Middle East, and Europe.
sentences.translation: 从20世纪50年代到70年代，欧姬芙广泛旅行，前往亚洲、中东和欧洲。

structure.text: From the 1950s into the 1970s
O’Keeffe travelled widely
making trips to Asia, the Middle East, and Europe

difficult_points: From...into... 表示跨越数十年的时间范围。
making 分词短语补充旅行目的地。

sentences.sentence: Flying in planes inspired her last two major series – aerial views of rivers and expansive paintings of the sky viewed from just above clouds.
sentences.translation: 乘飞机飞行激发了她最后两个重要系列的灵感——河流的空中景观，以及从云层上方描绘天空的宏大画作。

structure.text: Flying in planes
inspired her last two major series
aerial views of rivers and expansive paintings of the sky viewed from just above clouds
viewed from just above clouds

difficult_points: Flying 动名词作主语。
viewed 过去分词修饰 paintings，说明观看天空的视角。

sentences.sentence: In both series, O’Keeffe increased the size of her canvases, sometimes to mural proportions, reflecting perhaps her newly expanded view of the world.
sentences.translation: 在两个系列中，欧姬芙都扩大了画布尺寸，有时达到壁画的比例，或许反映了她拓展后的世界观。

structure.text: In both series
O’Keeffe increased the size of her canvases
sometimes to mural proportions
reflecting perhaps her newly expanded view of the world

difficult_points: sometimes to mural proportions 是结果补充，说明扩大程度。
reflecting 分词短语说明画布扩大的可能意义。

expressions.text: an expanded view of the world

sentences.sentence: When in 1965 she successfully translated one of her cloud motifs to a monumental canvas measuring 6 metres in length (with the help of assistants), it was an enormous challenge and a special feat for an artist nearing eighty years of age.
sentences.translation: 1965年，当她在助手帮助下成功把一个云朵主题转移到一幅长6米的巨型画布上时，这对一位年近八旬的艺术家来说是巨大挑战和非凡成就。

structure.text: When in 1965 she successfully translated one of her cloud motifs to a monumental canvas measuring 6 metres in length
with the help of assistants
it was an enormous challenge and a special feat for an artist nearing eighty years of age
measuring 6 metres in length

difficult_points: When 从句中 measuring 修饰 canvas；it 是形式主语，指整个创作事件。
nearing eighty years of age 是现在分词短语，说明艺术家年龄。

sentences.sentence: The last two decades of the artist’s life were relatively unproductive as ill health and blindness hindered her ability to work.
sentences.translation: 艺术家生命最后二十年创作相对少，因为疾病和失明妨碍了她工作的能力。

structure.text: The last two decades of the artist’s life
were relatively unproductive
as ill health and blindness hindered her ability to work

difficult_points: as 引导原因从句，说明创作减少的原因。
hindered her ability to work 中 ability 后接不定式。

sentences.sentence: O’Keeffe died in 1986 at the age of ninety-eight, but her rich legacy of some 900 paintings has continued to attract subsequent generations of artists and art lovers who derive inspiration from these very American images.
sentences.translation: 欧姬芙于1986年、98岁时去世，但她约900幅画作的丰富遗产持续吸引着后来的艺术家和艺术爱好者，他们从这些极具美国特色的图像中获得灵感。

structure.text: O’Keeffe died in 1986 at the age of ninety-eight
but her rich legacy of some 900 paintings has continued to attract subsequent generations of artists and art lovers
who derive inspiration from these very American images

difficult_points: but 连接死亡事实与艺术遗产延续的转折。
who 修饰 artists and art lovers；very American 强调鲜明的美国特色。
